introduction: 8:46 is a "narrative documentary" following an ensemble of characters and storylines in the days leading up to the September 11th attacks on the United States. Approaching the 10th anniversary of 9/11, this film was created to place audience members at the brink of the most heart-wrenching tragedy in American history, beckoning the message "We Will Never Forget". Often when people think of that day, the haunting images of the terror, the planes and large buildings being destroyed, the 2,977 deaths come to mind. This film was created to draw a more intimate, humane look at the tragic events of that day. This film is a reminder that thousands of innocent people lost their lives, and that each and every one of those people had a story. Each and every one of them had people that loved them, people that depended on them, something to live for... a life of VALUE. As we delve deep into the world of each character we witness the terror...
